84 G1BB G1BB_SUPP_TRANS 23bB(G1bB)Transfer - Support Provided CHAR 1 Indicates how the patient with support provided moves between surfaces. Examples include: moving from bed, chair, wheelchair to standing position. -1 = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+
